mapper.sql: id, code, name, name_en, type, device_item, func_domain, node_type, ota_support, core, sort, source, external_ref_id, external_version, last_sync_time, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_mdm_vehicle_node ( id, code, name, name_en, type, device_item, func_domain, node_type, ota_support, core, sort, source, external_ref_id, external_version, last_sync_time, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{code}, #{name}, #{nameEn}, #{type}, #{deviceItem}, #{funcDomain}, #{nodeType}, #{otaSupport}, #{core}, #{sort}, #{source}, #{externalRefId}, #{externalVersion}, #{lastSyncTime}, #{description}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_mdm_vehicle_node SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, name_en = #{nameEn}, type = #{type}, device_item = #{deviceItem}, func_domain = #{funcDomain}, node_type = #{nodeType}, ota_support = #{otaSupport}, core = #{core}, sort = #{sort}, source = #{source}, external_ref_id = #{externalRefId}, external_version = #{externalVersion}, last_sync_time = #{lastSyncTime}, description = #{description}, modify_by = #{modifyBy}, modify_time = now(), row_version = row_version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND row_valid = 1

UPDATE tb_mdm_vehicle_node SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, name_en = #{nameEn}, type = #{type}, device_item = #{deviceItem}, func_domain = #{funcDomain}, node_type = #{nodeType}, ota_support = #{otaSupport}, core = #{core}, sort = #{sort}, source = #{source}, external_ref_id = #{externalRefId}, external_version = #{externalVersion}, last_sync_time = #{lastSyncTime}, description = #{description}, modify_by = #{modifyBy}, modify_time = now(), row_version = row_version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND row_valid = 1
